headline: Earnings will be strong this year supported by secular economic trends, says Citi's Drew Pettit
summary: Drew Pettit, Citi U.S. equity strategist, joins 'The Exchange' to discuss the market fundamentals this year, stocks Pettit favors and much more.

headline: AI Did What Trump's Tariffs Didn't: Revive US Manufacturing
summary: U.S. manufacturing PMI hit 54 in April, a 47-month high. AI capex, not Trump tariffs, is doing the heavy lifting — and Wall Street is betting on more.

headline: Opening Bell: April 24, 2026
summary: Watch the opening bell for the New York Stock Exchange and the Nasdaq from April 24, 2026.
